test-case.description: GATE B.1: app code must not call Invoke-RestMethod
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE B.1: app code must not call Invoke-RestMethod

test-case.description: GATE B.2: app code must not call Invoke-WebRequest
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE B.2: app code must not call Invoke-WebRequest

test-case.description: GATE B.3: app code must not contain literal /api/v2/ paths
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE B.3: app code must not contain literal /api/v2/ paths

test-case.description: GATE B.4: app code must not call fetch() against Genesys API hosts
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE B.4: app code must not call fetch() against Genesys API hosts

test-case.description: GATE C.1: Genesys.Core module must not be copied into the app folder
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE C.1: Genesys.Core module must not be copied into the app folder

test-case.description: GATE C.2: Genesys.Core.psm1 must not be present in the app folder
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE C.2: Genesys.Core.psm1 must not be present in the app folder

test-case.description: GATE D.1: apps/ConversationAnalysis/index.html must exist
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.1: apps/ConversationAnalysis/index.html must exist

test-case.description: GATE D.2: index.html must not bundle chart libraries locally
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.2: index.html must not bundle chart libraries locally

test-case.description: GATE D.3: index.html must use FileReader API for data loading
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.3: index.html must use FileReader API for data loading

test-case.description: GATE D.4: app folder must not contain node_modules
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.4: app folder must not contain node_modules

test-case.description: GATE D.5: app code must not contain hardcoded bearer tokens
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.5: app code must not contain hardcoded bearer tokens

test-case.description: GATE D.6: app code must not contain hardcoded client_secret values
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.6: app code must not contain hardcoded client_secret values

test-case.description: GATE D.7: apps/ConversationAnalysis/README.md must exist
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.7: apps/ConversationAnalysis/README.md must exist

test-case.description: GATE D.8: index.html must reference Invoke-Dataset in its content (Core-first traceability)
test-case.name: ConversationAnalysis — Gate D Compliance.GATE D.8: index.html must reference Invoke-Dataset in its content (Core-first traceability)

test-case.description: contains no Invoke-RestMethod usage in the app
test-case.name: AuditLogsConsole — Core-First Compliance.contains no Invoke-RestMethod usage in the app

test-case.description: contains no Invoke-WebRequest usage in the app
test-case.name: AuditLogsConsole — Core-First Compliance.contains no Invoke-WebRequest usage in the app

test-case.description: contains no /api/v2/ literal in the app
test-case.name: AuditLogsConsole — Core-First Compliance.contains no /api/v2/ literal in the app

test-case.description: does not copy Genesys.Core into the app folder
test-case.name: AuditLogsConsole — Core-First Compliance.does not copy Genesys.Core into the app folder

test-case.description: keeps Invoke-Dataset usage inside App.CoreAdapter only
test-case.name: AuditLogsConsole — Core-First Compliance.keeps Invoke-Dataset usage inside App.CoreAdapter only

test-case.description: keeps Assert-Catalog usage inside App.CoreAdapter or App.ps1 startup narrative only
test-case.name: AuditLogsConsole — Core-First Compliance.keeps Assert-Catalog usage inside App.CoreAdapter or App.ps1 startup narrative only
